articles.title: Rabbitohs rookie sidelined after horror leg laceration
articles.description: He required 35 stitches after the injury on Sunday against the Newcastle Knights.

articles.title: Former Cowboys premiership star makes shock code switch
articles.description: Feldt played his last game for St. Helens at the start of June.
